title: Bridge Essay: Mindfulness Meditation: Impact on Attentional Control and Emotion Dysregulation.
concept: Spontaneous thought — mind-wandering, default mode network, creative cognition, involuntary thought.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Non-fabrication** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Spontaneous thought — mind-wandering, default mode network, creative cognition, involuntary thought.

**Mindfulness Meditation: Impact on Attentional Control and Emotion Dysregulation.** - Arch Clin Neuropsychol (2021). DOI: 10.1093/arclin/acab053. PMID: 34651648. OBJECTIVE: Theoretical models of mindfulness meditation conceptualize the cultivation of focused attention and regulation of emotional states, with the attitudinal foundations that promote nonjudgment and acceptance, to facilitate cognitive and affective processing resulting in improved brain health.
